title: The total change of a KdV conservative update is the negative boundary flux mismatch

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: For the configurable KdV conservative update, the total change equals minus scale times the right-left KdV boundary flux mismatch.
assumptions: all scalar parameters are real numbers
u is a real-valued grid state on natural-number indices
n and i are natural-number grid or range indices as used in the theorem statement
the KdV scaffold definitions are those in LeanNumerics.FiniteDifference.Kdv
informal.expected_conclusion: The total change is controlled exactly by the boundary flux mismatch.

declarations.name: totalChange_kdvConservativeUpdate
declarations.statement: theorem totalChange_kdvConservativeUpdate (scale nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : totalOn (fun i => kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion u i) n - totalOn u n = -scale * (kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u n - kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u 0)

tasks.input: Translate this KdV conservative scaffold theorem into Lean 4: For the configurable KdV conservative update, the total change equals minus scale times the right-left KdV boundary flux mismatch.
tasks.target: theorem totalChange_kdvConservativeUpdate (scale nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : totalOn (fun i => kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion u i) n - totalOn u n = -scale * (kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u n - kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u 0)

tasks.target: A proof by rewriting with totalOn_kdvConservativeUpdate and closing with ring.
